summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Owner Command Center Module (24+ pages). All pages load correctly with proper navigation, sidebar groups, theme toggle, and drill-down functionality. The module uses mock data from ownerData.js. Minor console warnings for Recharts dimensions and HTML nesting in tables (same issue as Manager Dashboard).

design_issues.screen: Multiple pages with tables (VenueComparison, FinancialOverview, CustomerIntelligence)
issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: <th>/<td>/<tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is caused by framer-motion wrapping table elements. Not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner HTML.
Duplicate key warning for 'og11' - Ryan Foster appears twice in the at-risk/lost guest list. This is a data issue in ownerData.js where the same guest ID is used twice.
Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1. This is a Recharts issue when charts render before container has dimensions. Not blocking functionality.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix motion.tr/motion.td HTML nesting warnings in table components - consider using CSS animations instead of framer-motion for table rows
FIX: Remove duplicate guest 'og11' (Ryan Foster) from ownerData.js at-risk/lost list to fix duplicate key warning
critical_code_review_comments: All 24+ Owner pages render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Sidebar navigation works with all 6 expandable groups (Performance, Customers, Growth & Loyalty, Finance & Risk, AI Insights) + System section
Back button navigates to home (/) correctly
CustomerProfileModal opens from Overview (Top Customers) and Customer Intelligence page
View Full History button navigates to full Customer Profile page (/owner/customers/:guestId)
Period filter pills are visible and clickable on Overview, Revenue, Profit, Financial pages
All drill-down pages work: Venue Detail, Event Detail, Venue Cost Detail, Customer Profile, Audience Genre Detail
GuestFullHistory canonical component renders correctly with all sections (Behavior Summary, KPIs, Venue/Category Breakdown, Events, Purchase History, Loyalty Activity)
seed_data_creation: All data is mock/static from ownerData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Command Center Module fully tested. All 24+ pages working: OwnerOverview, RevenueAnalytics, ProfitAnalysis, VenueComparison, TimeAnalysis, CustomerIntelligence, AudienceIntelligence, AudienceGenreDetail, Segments, ChurnRetention, CustomerProfile, LoyaltyPerformance, CampaignPerformance, FinancialOverview, CostAnalysis, VenueCostDetail, RiskAlerts, SmartInsights, ActionCenter, VenueManagement, VenueDetail, EventDetail, OwnerSettings. Guest IDs og1-og12 available for profile testing. At-risk guests: og5 (David Kim), og6 (Emma Wilson), og11 (Ryan Foster), og12 (Anna Wright). Lost guest: og11 (Ryan Foster).
